note: MLOps checkpoint registry. Each entry records a gated training candidate with config hash, eval-artifact references, and an explicit promotion verdict. Verifier/training-oracle passes are curriculum/self-extension rung gates only and are NOT benchmark (MATH/GSM8K/Vectara/hidden-pack) evidence (see agi-proof/preregistered-thresholds.md, THE ONE RULE).

checkpoints.recipe: GRPO RLVR, reward=agent.verifiers.math_equivalent (sympy, deterministic, judge-free), trl 0.19.1 + vllm 0.9.1 colocate, accelerate launch, epochs=3.0
checkpoints.trainPack: 164 train / 60 fixed held-out; held-out families disjoint from train (generalization)

metrics.evalKind: self-extension rung; held-out family-disjoint synthetic math pass@1; deterministic sympy verifier (judge-free, non-gameable)

checkpoints.promotionBasis: Self-extension RUNG gate cleared: >=3 seeds, all Delta>0, base 0/60 every seed, 95% across-seed CI [0.0585,0.1415] excludes 0, contamination-free, no regression, deterministic non-gameable verifier. This is a training-oracle/self-extension rung pass, NOT benchmark evidence.
checkpoints.honestScope: MODEST, NARROW: ~10% absolute on a small held-out synthetic math set where base floors at 0%. NOT an AGI claim; NOT citable as MATH/GSM8K proof.
checkpoints.checkpointWeightsNote: 177 MB adapter checkpoints stayed on auto-deleted RunPod pods; only JSON eval reports retained.
